title: Line and staff
summary: 9609 A Level — line managers vs staff advisers and potential conflict.

simpleExplanation.title: Doers and advisers
simpleExplanation.summary: Line managers run core operations and give orders. Staff specialists advise but lack direct command over line.
steps: Conflict if advice ignored or overreach.

sections.content: **Line and staff** (7.1.6) completes **7.1 structure**. Label roles on **organisation charts**.
